title: Oz Brigade

infobox.value: 2015–present
[Israel](/wiki/Israel "Israel")
[Israeli Ground Forces](/wiki/Israeli_Ground_Forces "Israeli Ground Forces")
[Commando](/wiki/Commando "Commando")
[Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)") [98th Division](/wiki/98th_Division_(IDF) "98th Division (IDF)")
Commando brigade
"Thy hand shall be on the neck of thine enemies" ([Genesis](/wiki/Book_of_Genesis "Book of Genesis") 49:8) [[1]](#cite_note-1)
Brigadier General Omer Cohen

(**89th Brigade**), also known as **Commando Brigade**, is an [infantry](/wiki/Infantry "Infantry") formation for [special operations](/wiki/Special_operation "Special operation") of the [Israeli Ground Forces](/wiki/Israeli_Ground_Forces "Israeli Ground Forces"). The brigade brings together four commando units – the [Egoz Unit](/wiki/Egoz_Unit "Egoz Unit"), the [Maglan Unit](/wiki/Maglan "Maglan"), the [Duvdevan Unit](/wiki/Duvdevan_Unit "Duvdevan Unit") and the Operational Support Unit.[[2]](#cite_note-2) It was established in December 2015.[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3) Commanded by [Colonel](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces_ranks "Israel Defense Forces ranks") Omer Cohen, the brigade operates as part of the [98th Division](/wiki/98th_Division_(IDF) "98th Division (IDF)").[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3)[[4]](#cite_note-DefNews-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)
+ Unit 212 "[Maglan](/wiki/Maglan "Maglan")" – special reconnaissance unit[[11]](#cite_note-11)

Hebrew: "יָדְךָ בְּעֹרֶף אֹיְבֶיךָ", English translation from [KJV](/wiki/King_James_Version "King James Version"). [IDF Official website](https://www.idf.il/%D7%90%D7%AA%D7%A8%D7%99%D7%9D/%D7%97%D7%98%D7%99%D7%91%D7%AA-%D7%94%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%9E%D7%A0%D7%93%D7%95/%D7%90%D7%95%D7%93%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%A7%D7%95%D7%9E%D7%A0%D7%93%D7%95/)

["מפקד חדש לעוצבת הקומנדו: אלוף-משנה עומר כהן"](https://www.inn.co.il/news/603321). *www.inn.co.il*. Retrieved 2024-06-23.

["IDF Commando Brigade unveiled amid threats from Nasrallah and Al-Baghdadi"](https://warsclerotic.wordpress.com/2015/12/28/idf-commando-brigade-unveiled-amid-threats-from-nasrallah-and-al-baghdadi/). *A Sclerotic Goes to War*. 27 December 2015. Retrieved 14 January 2016.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Israeli military special operations brigade

| Oz Brigade | |
| --- | --- |
| 89th brigade patch | |
| Active | 2015–present |
| Country | [Israel](/wiki/Israel "Israel") |
| Branch | [Israeli Ground Forces](/wiki/Israeli_Ground_Forces "Israeli Ground Forces") |
| Role | [Commando](/wiki/Commando "Commando") |
| Part of | [Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)") [98th Division](/wiki/98th_Division_(IDF) "98th Division (IDF)") |
| Nickname | Commando brigade |
| Motto | "Thy hand shall be on the neck of thine enemies" ([Genesis](/wiki/Book_of_Genesis "Book of Genesis") 49:8) [[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| Commanders | |
| Current commander | Brigadier General Omer Cohen |

Military unit

The **Oz Brigade** (**89th Brigade**), also known as **Commando Brigade**, is an [infantry](/wiki/Infantry "Infantry") formation for [special operations](/wiki/Special_operation "Special operation") of the [Israeli Ground Forces](/wiki/Israeli_Ground_Forces "Israeli Ground Forces"). The brigade brings together four commando units – the [Egoz Unit](/wiki/Egoz_Unit "Egoz Unit"), the [Maglan Unit](/wiki/Maglan "Maglan"), the [Duvdevan Unit](/wiki/Duvdevan_Unit "Duvdevan Unit") and the Operational Support Unit.[[2]](#cite_note-2) It was established in December 2015.[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3) Commanded by [Colonel](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces_ranks "Israel Defense Forces ranks") Omer Cohen, the brigade operates as part of the [98th Division](/wiki/98th_Division_(IDF) "98th Division (IDF)").[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3)[[4]](#cite_note-DefNews-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)

## Ideation and development

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Oz_Brigade&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Ideation and development")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f1/Iron_Swords-Maglan_unit-003.jpg/250px-Iron_Swords-Maglan_unit-003.jpg)](/wiki/File:Iron_Swords-Maglan_unit-003.jpg)

Oz Brigade in [Gaza](/wiki/Gaza_Strip "Gaza Strip") in February 2024

According to the IDF, the Commando Brigade is the brainchild of [Lieutenant General](/wiki/Lieutenant_General "Lieutenant General") [Gadi Eisenkot](/wiki/Gadi_Eisenkot "Gadi Eisenkot") and is the implementation of operational lessons learned during [Operation Protective Edge](/wiki/Operation_Protective_Edge "Operation Protective Edge") in the summer of 2014 and the [Second Lebanon War](/wiki/Second_Lebanon_War "Second Lebanon War") in 2006. According to the 98th Division Commander, the brigade is an integration of the elite teams of the Infantry Corps under one command, and a body expected to lead operational and tactical thinking in order to establish a new warfare doctrine.[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3)[[6]](#cite_note-AlMonitor1-6) The new Brigade is intended to provide special operations units a previously lacking centre of gravity.[[4]](#cite_note-DefNews-4)

The concept of a commando brigade was developed by IDF Chief of Staff Gadi Eisenkot during the formulation of the 5-years military plan. The new brigade is said to draw further parallels between Israel's special forces and the American [75th Ranger Regiment](/wiki/75th_Ranger_Regiment "75th Ranger Regiment").[[7]](#cite_note-Ynet-7)

Other special-operations units, [Sayeret Matkal](/wiki/Sayeret_Matkal "Sayeret Matkal"), [Shayetet 13](/wiki/Shayetet_13 "Shayetet 13"), [Shaldag](/wiki/Shaldag_Unit "Shaldag Unit"), [Oketz](/wiki/Oketz_Unit "Oketz Unit") and [Yahalom](/wiki/Yahalom_(IDF) "Yahalom (IDF)") continue to operate independently.[[8]](#cite_note-Sclerotic-8)

### Brigade organization

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Oz_Brigade&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Brigade organization")]

The 89th Brigade consists of three (formerly four) commando units of the IDF.[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3)[[4]](#cite_note-DefNews-4) The brigade had a fourth battalion, the now defunct Unit 845, or "[Rimon](https://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%99%D7%97%D7%99%D7%93%D7%AA_%D7%A8%D7%99%D7%9E%D7%95%D7%9F_(2010) "he:יחידת רימון (2010)")", desert warfare unit, which was absorbed into Maglan in June 2018.[[9]](#cite_note-9) It also has an elite transport unit tasked with transporting special operations soldiers to and from battlefields in a variety of conditions,[[10]](#cite_note-10) assorted support units, and a commando training school. As of 2025, the brigade consists of:

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/08/89th_Oz_Brigade.png/40px-89th_Oz_Brigade.png)](/wiki/File:89th_Oz_Brigade.png) **89th Commando Brigade Oz/Courage**
  + Unit 212 "[Maglan](/wiki/Maglan "Maglan")" – special reconnaissance unit[[11]](#cite_note-11)
  + Unit 217 "[Duvdevan](/wiki/Duvdevan_Unit "Duvdevan Unit")" – undercover counter terrorism unit
  + Unit 621 "[Egoz](/wiki/Egoz_Unit "Egoz Unit")" – guerilla warfare unit[[12]](#cite_note-12)
  + General Staff Mobility Unit 5515
  + Aerial Medical Unit
  + Logistic Battalion
  + Signal Company
  + Commando School "Oz"

## Commanders

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Oz_Brigade&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Commanders")]

* Brigadier General David Zini (2015–2017)
* Brigadier General Avi Blot (2017–2018)
* Colonel Kobi Heller (2018 –2021)
* Brigadier General Meni Liberty (2021–2023)
* Colonel Omer Cohen (2023-present)

## Insignia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Oz_Brigade&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Insignia")]

The insignia chosen for the new brigade depicts the Hebrew letter Quf (ק), the first letter in the Hebrew word for Commando (קומנדו), composed of a commando knife rising from the sea and a double headed arrow above it. It symbolizes the special designation of the brigade and its mobility, by air, land or sea.[[3]](#cite_note-SpecForInt-3)[[13]](#cite_note-OzTimes-13)

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Oz_Brigade&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: See also")]

* [Special forces of Israel](/wiki/Special_forces_of_Israel "Special forces of Israel")
* [Mista'arvim](/wiki/Mista%27arvim "Mista'arvim")
* [11th 'Yiftach' Brigade](/wiki/Yiftach_Brigade "Yiftach Brigade") - functions as the reserve commando brigade in the IDF
